notice-board.title: About Nuu
notice-board.subtitle: the noticeboard
lines: Nuu (нүү) — the verb shatar players use when they make their move.
A community of Mongolian builders, breakers, and shippers — scattered across the world, gathered here.
Drop your move on the Discord. Then make the next one.

pavilion.title: Events
pavilion.subtitle: upcoming gatherings
lines: All RSVP from the events list below the world.

bookshelf.title: Library
bookshelf.subtitle: read · write · share
lines: Essays and primers — a shatar guide, diaspora notes, and more from the community.
Members can write their own. Submit a draft and an editor will publish it.

portal.title: Discord
portal.subtitle: step through
lines: Step through the portal to join the Discord.
First move you make: introduce yourself in #intros.

salon.title: Customize
salon.subtitle: your character
lines: Pick your character — choose a look you like from the lineup.
Your pick shows to other members and is saved to your profile.
